description: 6 emergency workflows (confined-space-rescue, disaster-response, electrical-emergency, high-angle-rescue, mechanical-accident, medical-emergency) cited 중대재해처벌법 Article 7 (Dual liability — corporate penalty) for the general safety-and-health assurance obligation, which is actually Article 4. disaster-response also cited a non-existent 'OSHA-KR Article 5'. Systemic, repeated mis-citation across the highest-stakes (life-safety, SAPA-exposure) workflow cluster.
